payload.text:
[CODE REVIEW REQUEST] round 1/3
verification-evidence:
1) UI structure changed to three always-visible grouped selectors (<select>): 1K / HD / 2K in front/components/ControlPanel.tsx.
2) Exact preset values + labels are present:
- 1K 1:1 (1024x1024), 1K 16:9 (1024x576), 1K 9:16 (576x1024), 1K 4:3 (1024x768), 1K 3:4 (768x1024)
- HD 16:9 (1920x1088), HD 9:16 (1088x1920)
- 2K 1:1 (2048x2048), 2K 16:9 (2048x1152), 2K 9:16 (1152x2048)
3) Active/muted style logic is now selector-based:
- active group uses highlighted style (bg-indigo-600 border-indigo-500 text-white)
- inactive groups keep muted style (bg-white/5 border-white/10 text-white/60)
4) No backend/API contract changes; only front/components/ControlPanel.tsx updated.
5) Verification build passed: npm run build (front/).
